subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。左親指手前の糸を右手で持ち、左親指に1周巻きます
subtitle.en: Begin in "Position 1". Take the near left-thumb string with the right hand and wrap it once around the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左親指の輪に右人差し指を下から入れて糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Insert the right index finger from below into the left-thumb loop and pick up the string.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指で、右手のひらの糸をを右人差し指の輪の中から取ります
subtitle.en: With the left index finger, pick up the right-palm string from inside the right–index-finger loop.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指で、左手のひらの糸をを左人差し指の輪の中から取ります
subtitle.en: With the right index finger, pick up the left-palm string from inside the left–index-finger loop.

subtitle.ja: 左手から全ての糸を静かに外します
subtitle.en: Let all the strings fall away from the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の上の輪を左手で持ち、右人差し指下の糸の上を通して上下を入れ替えます
subtitle.en: With the left hand, take the upper loop on the right index finger and carry it over the lower right–index-finger string to exchange the upper and lower positions.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の2本の輪の間に左親指と小指を入れ、上の輪を左親指で、下の輪を左小指で取り、右人差し指から糸を外します
subtitle.en: Insert the left thumb and little finger between the two loops on the right index finger, take the upper loop on the left thumb and the lower loop on the left little finger, and release the strings from the right index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪を反対側の手で持ち、手前側に半回転させて元の親指に戻します
subtitle.en: With the opposite hand, take each thumb loop, turn it halfway toward you, and return it to the original thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の輪に人差し指を上から入れ、親指向こう側の糸を取ります。人差し指から糸が外れないように親指で押さえ、両手を左右に開いて完成です
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the little-finger loops and move over and pick down the far thumb strings. Hold them in place with the thumbs so they do not slip off the index fingers, and open the hands to the sides to show the finished figure.
